home.technology.t1Desc: High-resolution digital scans for extreme surgical accuracy in implant placement.
home.technology.t2Desc: Simulate your final result before treatment begins with advanced facial mapping.
home.technology.t3Desc: Minimally invasive soft tissue procedures with faster healing and zero discomfort.
home.treatments.2.desc: Immediate full-arch rehabilitation for total tooth loss using the proven All-on-4 protocol.
treatments.heroDesc: Discover world-class dental care in Istanbul. From cosmetic dentistry to full-mouth rehabilitation, our specialist dentists deliver exceptional results with advanced technology and personalized treatment planning.
treatments.title: Clinical Disciplines
treatments.subtitle: Expert dental treatments designed for your unique smile goals
treatments.collectionDesc: Each dental treatment at FeRa Clinic is carefully planned to deliver exceptional results with minimal discomfort and maximum precision. Treatment plans are personalized based on individual clinical evaluation.
treatments.ctaDesc: Contact our Istanbul clinic today for a complimentary consultation and personalized treatment plan. Our specialist dentists are ready to help you achieve your dental health goals.
treatments.detail.implants.title: Dental Implants Istanbul
treatments.detail.implants.desc: The gold standard for permanent tooth replacement. Our surgical specialists utilize Swiss-engineered titanium implants and 3D computer-guided protocols to restore full biological function and natural aesthetics with a lifetime clinical warranty.
treatments.detail.implants.seo.title: Dental Implants Istanbul | Implant Treatment Turkey | Permanent Tooth Replacement
treatments.detail.implants.seo.descripti: Premium dental implants in Istanbul, Turkey. Swiss-engineered titanium implants with 3D guided surgery. Permanent tooth replacement with lifetime warranty. Specialist oral surgeons.
treatments.detail.implants.heroDesc: Experience the pinnacle of implant dentistry at FeRa Clinic. Our board-certified oral surgeons combine Swiss precision engineering with advanced 3D surgical planning to deliver permanent, natural-looking tooth replacements that restore both function and confidence.
treatments.detail.implants.benefitsOverv: Why choose dental implants at FeRa Clinic? Our implant protocols represent the fusion of biological science and surgical precision, offering a permanent solution that looks, feels, and functions like your natural teeth.
treatments.detail.implants.process: Comprehensive 3D CBCT imaging and digital treatment planning
Computer-guided implant placement with sub-millimeter precision
Custom crown fabrication and final aesthetic integration
treatments.detail.implants.features: Immediate loading protocols when clinically appropriate
Lifetime clinical warranty on implant success
treatments.detail.implants.benefits: Prevents jawbone resorption and facial collapse
Restores 100% natural bite force and function
Custom porcelain crowns with natural translucency
Maintains facial proportions and youthful appearance
treatments.detail.hollywood.title: Hollywood Smile Istanbul
treatments.detail.hollywood.desc: A comprehensive smile transformation using ultra-thin E-Max porcelain veneers. Our master ceramists craft each veneer to enhance your facial symmetry and create a radiant, natural-looking smile that reflects your personality.
treatments.detail.hollywood.seo.title: Hollywood Smile Istanbul | Smile Makeover Turkey | Porcelain Veneers
treatments.detail.hollywood.seo.descript: Premium Hollywood Smile makeovers in Istanbul, Turkey. Custom E-Max porcelain veneers with Digital Smile Design. Natural-looking smile transformations with master ceramists.
treatments.detail.hollywood.heroDesc: Experience the art of smile design at FeRa Clinic. Our master ceramists combine advanced Digital Smile Design with hand-crafted E-Max porcelain veneers to create a smile that enhances your natural beauty and confidence.
treatments.detail.hollywood.benefitsOver: Why choose a Hollywood Smile at FeRa Clinic? Our approach combines artistic excellence with dental science to create smile transformations that look completely natural while delivering lasting aesthetic results.
treatments.detail.hollywood.benefits: Minimal biological impact on natural teeth
Our smile makeovers focus on enhancing your natural beauty rather than creating artificial results. Each transformation is designed to complement your facial features and personality.
Results vary based on individual clinical evaluation and personal aesthetic goals. Treatment planning includes comprehensive assessment of dental health and facial structure.
treatments.detail.ortho.title: Orthodontics Istanbul
treatments.detail.ortho.desc: Advanced teeth straightening solutions for a perfectly aligned, healthy bite. Our specialist orthodontists use modern clear aligners and precise digital planning to create beautiful, functional smiles with predictable results.
treatments.detail.ortho.seo.title: Orthodontics Istanbul | Braces Turkey | Clear Aligners | Teeth Straightening
treatments.detail.ortho.seo.description: Expert orthodontic treatment in Istanbul, Turkey. Clear aligners and modern braces for teeth straightening. Specialist orthodontists with digital planning for predictable results.
treatments.detail.ortho.heroDesc: Experience advanced orthodontic care at FeRa Clinic. Our specialist orthodontists combine digital treatment planning with modern clear aligner technology to create perfectly aligned smiles that enhance both function and aesthetics.
treatments.detail.ortho.whatIsIt.title: What is Orthodontics?
treatments.detail.ortho.whatIsIt.descrip: Orthodontics is a specialized branch of dentistry focused on correcting teeth and jaw alignment. Using modern clear aligners and precise digital planning, we gradually move teeth into their ideal positions for a healthy, functional bite and beautiful smile.
treatments.detail.ortho.whoNeedsIt.title: Who Needs Orthodontic Treatment?
treatments.detail.ortho.whoNeedsIt.candi: Desire for a straighter, more confident smile
treatments.detail.ortho.benefits.title: Benefits of Orthodontic Treatment
treatments.detail.ortho.benefits.list: Improved oral health and easier cleaning
Enhanced bite function and chewing efficiency
Reduced risk of dental problems and wear
treatments.detail.ortho.treatmentProcess: Personalized treatment plan with predicted results
treatments.detail.ortho.technology.title: Advanced Orthodontic Technology
treatments.detail.ortho.technology.featu: Clear aligner therapy with precise control
treatments.detail.ortho.trustFactors.tit: Why Choose FeRa Clinic for Orthodontics?
treatments.detail.ortho.safetyNote: Treatment duration and results vary based on individual clinical assessment and treatment complexity. All orthodontic treatments include comprehensive planning and regular monitoring by specialist orthodontists.
treatments.notFoundDesc: The requested treatment protocol is currently being reviewed and updated by our chief medical board.

treatments.getPlanDesc: Receive a personalized smile design consultation and treatment plan from our master ceramists and cosmetic dentists.
